sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n62540" key="leptotari/xion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λεπτο-τᾰρίχιον</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑχ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n62540.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">small pickled fish, PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:2184" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2184</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(iii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
